title: justicia pseudorungia
intro: Justicia pseudorungia, also known as Kalmegh or Tinospora cordifolia, is an Ayurvedic herb commonly found in the tropical regions of India and Southeast Asia. It is widely used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to exhibit antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral activities. The plant has been shown to provide several health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Justicia pseudorungia is often used to make decoctions, infusions, and powders, which can be consumed as teas, capsules, or added to food products.
